title: 300GB story: how to inspire action when data isn’t enough
speakers: Luke Fiorante (Design Engineer, Harvard University), Sirinda Limsong (Product Designer, Harvard University)
key_points: Presented by Luke Fiorante (Design Engineer) and Sirinda Limsong (Product Designer) from Harvard University, the talk centers on a '300GB story' and the challenge of inspiring action when data alone isn't enough.
The session explores how large volumes of data (referenced as 300GB) must be translated into compelling narrative to actually drive people to act.
Figma's official abstract for this Config 2026 session was not yet published at the time of summarizing ('More info coming soon...'), so detailed content specifics are not available.
